data.title: Ethereum price may rise 75% compared to Bitcoin by New Year, as signals show bullish momentum & pattern.
data.description: ETH is showing signs of gaining momentum against Bitcoin in the near future, as indicated by an inverse head-and-shoulders pattern and bullish momentum signals. This suggests that the value of ETH is likely to increase relative to Bitcoin in the upcoming weeks.

data.title: NOARK presents renewable energy innovations at RE+ 2025 in Las Vegas. Global leader in circuit protection.
data.description: NOARK Electric, a renowned company specializing in circuit protection, motor control, and power distribution solutions, recently presented groundbreaking renewable energy innovations at the RE+ 2025 event held in Las Vegas. This global leader in the industry showcased their latest technologies and solutions for the renewable energy sector. The exhibition featured a range of innovative products aimed at advancing the renewable energy industry. The event attracted a significant number of attendees, including industry experts and enthusiasts, eager to learn about the latest advancements in sustainability. The showcased solutions by NOARK Electric aimed to drive significant progress in renewable energy adoption and promote sustainability practices across various sectors.

data.title: Casago Unwind to manage 50+ Vacasa vacation homes in Coeur d’Alene, Idaho. Led by Edward and Michele Johnson.
data.description: A new Casago franchise partner, Casago Unwind, has taken charge of over 50 Vacasa vacation rental properties in Coeur d’Alene, Idaho. Led by Edward and Michele Johnson, who have strong connections to the local community, the duo brings extensive experience and commitment to property management. Edward hails from Coeur d’Alene, while Michele has roots in Montana, providing them with invaluable insights into the region’s tourism sector. Their partnership aims at enhancing the vacation rental experience in the area.

WHO: ‘Following the outbreak in the WHO is launching a US$ 21 million appeal to help the country: - Scale up operations - Interrupt transmission chains - Prevent further spread - Mitigate the impact on human health’

data.title: HappyFunCorp hosting webinar on designing impactful products with tech leaders Jonathan Zaleski and Arthi Krishnaswami.
data.description: Two key figures in the company's technology division, Jonathan Zaleski, the VP of technical architecture, and Arthi Krishnaswami, the director of client services, are set to participate in a panel discussion alongside other industry experts. The panel will focus on discussing strategies for developing robust and socially conscious products that motivate change and generate influence.

data.title: SpringGreen in Richmond, KY welcomes new franchise owners Chad and Andrea Davis, along with Chuck Day, to lead operations.
data.description: SpringGreen is excited to introduce Chad and Andrea Davis as the latest franchise owners in Richmond, Kentucky. Alongside them is Chad's brother-in-law, Chuck Day, who will play a key role in managing day-to-day activities. With their combined experience spanning over several decades, this dynamic team is set to make an impact in the region. The addition of the Davis family brings the total number of franchise owners in Richmond to X.
Citigroup downgraded Intel to "Sell" from "Neutral" but increased the price target to $29 from $24.

data.title: BEN appoints Dr. Carrasco to board; debuts AI agent at conference. Stock - Nasdaq: BNAI. Sept. 19, 2025.
data.description: On September 19, 2025, Brand Engagement Network, Inc. (Nasdaq: BNAI) revealed the addition of Dr. Ruy Carrasco to its Board of Directors as of September 18, 2025. BEN specializes in human-like AI Agents for regulated industries.

data.title: Aluminum Fluoride market to reach $3.12B by 2030, per MarketsandMarkets™. Various types of AlF3 used in different applications.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida on September 19, 2025, a report on the Aluminum Fluoride (AlF3) Market was released. The report categorizes the market by product type, including anhydrous, dry, and wet forms, based on bulk density (low or high), form (powder or granules), grade (smelter, catalyst, technical, high-purity), and application. This comprehensive analysis explores various uses of Aluminum Fluoride such as electrolyte additive and flux agent. This market report is expected to provide valuable insights for industries and professionals.

data.title: KuCoin Futures introduces trading upgrade for better execution and risk management; aimed at professional traders.
data.description: In Providenciales, the Turks and Caicos Islands, a major cryptocurrency platform, KuCoin, recently shared news of a significant development. On September 19, 2025, KuCoin launched an enhanced system upgrade specifically designed to cater to the requirements of professional traders and those engaged in high-frequency trading. This upgrade applies to KuCoin Futures, a feature of the platform. KuCoin boasts a strong global presence and reputation as a trusted entity in the cryptocurrency space.

data.title: Shanghai hosts Global Gen Z Forum at Yangpu Riverside with dozens of young participants on Sept 14.
data.description: On September 14, 2025, Shanghai's Yangpu Riverside hosted the Global Generation Z Forum on Innovative Coexistence in People-Oriented Cities, attracting numerous international youths. The event aimed to discuss strategies for developing people-oriented cities. Generation Z, typically referring to individuals born between the mid-1990s and early 2010s, were prominent participants in this event.

data.title: MoneyHero Group announces Q2 2025 results with strong performance as personal finance platform and digital insurance provider.
data.description: Singapore-based MoneyHero Limited (Nasdaq: MNY) disclosed its financial performance for the second quarter ending June 30, 2025. As a prominent personal finance aggregation and comparison platform, along with its role as a digital insurance brokerage in Greater Southeast Asia, the Company shared its results on September 19, 2025.

data.title: ONDO price at $1.05 remains resilient above $0.99 support level despite recent 0.40% drop, showing bullish momentum.
data.description: The cryptocurrency ONDO is currently trading at $1.05 with significant bullish momentum indicators, despite experiencing a recent slight decline of 0.40%. This demonstrates its resilience above the crucial support level of $0.99.

data.title: McDonald's invests in regenerative agriculture, Lilly opens new facility, USPS launches Operation Santa. 14 press releases.
data.description: In the latest developments, McDonald's has announced a substantial investment in regenerative agriculture practices. The initiative aims to promote sustainable farming methods and reduce the fast-food chain's environmental footprint. Concurrently, pharmaceutical company Lilly has unveiled plans to construct a cutting-edge manufacturing facility, signaling significant growth within the industry. Additionally, the United States Postal Service has launched Operation Santa, a festive program that aims to bring joy to thousands of children during the holiday season. These updates highlight the ongoing advancements in various sectors, showcasing a commitment to innovation and positive impact.

data.title: Innovent's Mazdutide approved by China's NMPA for Type 2 diabetes in adults. HKEX: 01801.  World-class biopharmaceutical company.
data.description: On September 19, 2025, Innovent Biologics, Inc. announced its operations in both San Francisco and Suzhou, China. Innovent, listed as HKEX: 01801, is a leading biopharmaceutical company with a focus on developing, producing, and distributing top-notch medications for various medical conditions. Their specialties lie in treatments for oncologic, autoimmune, and cardiovascular issues.

data.title: IRS official, Holly Paz, sues agency for leaking private data to media outlets, including Fox News. She was put on leave after overseeing tax shelters.
data.description: Holly Paz, along with a team of officials, was reviewing tax shelters until she was suspended, with Fox News claiming she was terminated from her position.

data.title: Fed faces dilemma as hiring slows and inflation rises, unsure how fast to cut rates after resuming cuts, amidst economic uncertainty and political pressure.
data.description: Concerns are arising within the central bank regarding the pace at which interest rates should be reduced following a resumption of cuts on Wednesday. This decision comes amidst conflicting economic indicators and ongoing pressure from the White House. The central bank is deliberating on the optimal strategy to navigate these challenges while continuing to support the economy.

data.title: Disney suspends Jimmy Kimmel amid political backlash and affiliate concerns, impacting late-night viewership numbers.
data.description: Disney decided to suspend the late-night host suddenly due to political pressure and worries about their relationship with affiliate owners.

data.title: Nvidia is investing $5B in Intel, strengthening the rivalry and collaborating on AI technology.
data.description: A collaboration agreement has been reached between two chipmakers, whose recent performances have shown significant differences in their fortunes. As part of the deal, they aim to work together on developing technology crucial for driving artificial intelligence.

data.title: New exclusive card emerges with Amex's Platinum Refresh, costing $895/year, offers lifestyle perks appealing to younger generations.
data.description: A yearly fee of $895 will be charged for the card, showcasing a strong focus on lifestyle and travel perks that appeal particularly to younger individuals.
